questionHtml:
If Vishal covers 184 km in a boat in 48 hours against the stream and he takes 12 hours with the stream, then find the speed of the stream.

  1. 5.75 km/hr

  2. 14.36 km/hr

  3. 10.64 km/hr

  4. 13.66 km/hr
subject: Quant

_source.testSeries: Maths (Sectional PYP) RRB NTPC 2025 CBT - I (47 Shift)
_source.product: Railway Tcs Test Pass : 2026 Exam: Railway

questionHtml:
A boat moves 25km upstream and 39km downstream in 8 hours. It travels 35km upstream and 52km downstream in 11 hours. What is the speed of the stream if it travels at a uniform speed?

  1. 4 km/h

  2. 5 km/h

  3. 6 km/h

  4. 3 km/h
subject: Quant

_source.product: SSC Eduquity Test Pass : 2026 Exam: SSC

questionHtml:
A boat can go 3 km upstream and 5 km downstream in 55 minutes. It can also go 4 km upstream and 9 km downstream in 1 hour 25 minutes. In how much time (in hours) will it go 43.2 km downstream ?

  1. 4.8

  2. 5.4

  3. 3.6

  4. 4.4
subject: Quant

_source.testSeries: Math [P.Y.P] Chapter wise test SSC CGL 2019 (03-03-2020 to 09-03-2020 )
_source.product: Chapter Wise Tests for All SSC Exams : 2026 (EDUQUITY BASED) Exam: SSC

questionHtml:
In one hour, a boat goes 46 km/hr in the direction of the stream and 36 km/hr against the direction of the stream. What will be the speed of the current ?

  1. 5 km/hr

  2. 11 km/hr

  3. 2 km/hr

  4. 4 km/hr
subject: Quant

_source.testSeries: Maths (Sectional PYP) RRB NTPC 2025 CBT - I (47 Shift)

questionHtml:
A boat can go 3.6 km upstream and 5.4 km downstream in 54 minutes, while it can go 5.4 km upstream and 3.6 km downstream in 58.5 minutes. The time (in minutes) taken by the boat in going 10 km downstream is:

  1. 48

  2. 54

  3. 50

  4. 45
subject: Quant

questionHtml:
In a certain code language, 'STREAM' is coded as 161418445228. How will 'PERIOD' be coded in that language?

questionHtml:
A boat goes 27 km upstream and 33 downstream in 6 hours. In the same time it can go 36 km upstream and 22 downstream. How much time will it take to go 36 km upstream and 44 km downstream?

  1. 8 h

  2. 8 h 10 m

  3. 7 h 50 m

  4. 8 h 30 m
subject: Quant

questionHtml:
Anup can row 33 km downstream and 35km upstream in 8 hours. He can also row 44 km downstream and 28 km upstream in the same time. How much time (in hours) will be take to row 55km downstream and 14 km upstream?

  1. 9

  2. 6

  3. 8

  4. 7
subject: Quant

questionHtml:

  2. 10

  3. 15

questionHtml:
If Ishwar covers 721 km in a boat in 42 hours against the stream and he takes 15 hours with the stream, then find the speed of the stream.

questionHtml:
22. A man rows to a place 48 km distant and comes back in 14 hours. He finds that he can row 4 km with the stream in the same time as 3 km against the stream. The speed of the stream is:

  1. 1.5 km/h

  2. 3.5 km/h

  3. 1.8 km/h

  4. 1 km/h
subject: Quant

questionHtml:
In one hour, a boat goes 47 km/hr in the direction of the stream and 19 km/hr against the direction of the stream. What will be the speed of the current ?

  1. 19 km/hr

  2. 11 km/hr

  3. 20 km/hr

  4. 14 km/hr

questionHtml:
X, Y are two points in a river. Points P and Q divide the straight line XY into three equal parts. The river flows along XY and the time taken by a boat to row from X to Q and from Y to Q are in the ratio 4 : 5. The ratio of the speed of the boat downstream to that of the river current is equal to:

  1. 3 : 10

  2. 3 : 4

  3. 10 : 3

  4. 4 : 3
subject: Quant

_source.testSeries: Math [P.Y.P] ssc cgl 2020 (21 Sets) 13 August 2021 - 24 August 2021
_source.product: SSC Eduquity Test Pass : 2026 Exam: SSC
